commit_scope: Verified the full form-cli COMMAND-LINE INTERFACE builds and runs c-bootstrapped on the fkwu universal kernel — the CLI rung above the bare-recipe rung the 2026-06-23 fkwu-standalone receipt observed. build-form-cli.sh emitted the universal walker (fkc-emit-combined-repl: same fkc-pr-text/fkc-decl-universal-text/fkc-walk-many-text body as fkc-emit-universal, differing only in main()) with the form-cli-repl program baked in, compiled once with clang into a 435536-byte self-contained ELF that links only libc.so.6 + ld-linux (no Go/clang/python/bash at runtime). Exercised every baked verb over piped stdin (ping->pong, version, help, kernel, about, verify, native-host, source, unknown-verb) deterministically; the `source` verb reprinted all 315655 bytes of its own Form source (self-recreating c-bootstrap closure). Separately reproduced the prior receipt: validate.sh field-identity four-way (Go/Rust/TS/fkwu) -> 511, 0 divergent, and ran the fkwu ELF directly on the pre-flattened table (./fkwu <table> 0 -> 511). Also added a .gitignore rule for the reproducible form/form-cli build product so it never dirties the tree.

commands: ldd form/form-cli                # linux-vdso, libc.so.6, ld-linux only
local_validation.native_binary: form/form-cli self-contained ELF (libc+ld-linux only); the fkwu universal-kernel ELF runs the pre-flattened table directly -> 511.
local_validation.notes: The RUN of both the form-cli CLI and the fkwu kernel is toolchain-free; the BUILD used the Go flattener (table) and clang (emit C -> native), so this is the runtime + CLI rung, not yet the clang-free form-asm c-bootstrap lane. The same universal walker carries both surfaces (bare table-runner via fkc-main-universal-text; baked REPL CLI via fkc-main-baked-repl-text) — one engine, two main()s.

ci_validation.notes: Observation record; the four-way gate runs in CI on the underlying field-identity band.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy; a build + runtime-observation receipt.

phase_gate.gate: Observe, in this linux/x86-64 sandbox, that the full form-cli CLI (not just a bare verdict recipe) builds and runs c-bootstrapped on fkwu, toolchain-free at runtime, with a verified self-source closure.
pending_rungs: c-bootstrap: binary is clang-bootstrapped (Form->C->clang) and the program/table Go-flattened; the clang-free form-asm lane (Form->asm bytes) remains the north-star rung
platforms{mac,windows,android}: pending — no devices/network in this sandbox; only linux/x86-64 observed
